data.text: P04/06 FELISIAN. 7.92 LANDING WAS ON HILLY, BARREN GROUND WITH A
VERY FAMILIAR SHAPE SIGHTED TO THE SOUTH; IT IS NOT PRECISELY A
PYRAMIDAL OBJECT, BUT A PINNACL BEARING A STRONG RESEMBLANCE TO ONE
OF THE 'STAR TOWERS' RUINS FOUND IN THE HOME WORLDS. 0.91 ON THE
OTHER HAND IS GRASSY WITH A DOWNHILL SLOPE HAVING TREES SCATTERED
ABOUT; A MOUND HILL AT THE BOTTOM HAS A PIT NEARBY, NOT LARGE- BUT IN
MY HUMBLE OPINION, NONE ARE SMALL. 334.9 IS COLD, MOUNTAINOUS, BARREN
AND ANOTHER LANDING WAS MADE AT 336.9 AS THEY ARE AT INTERESTNG
SURFACE LOCATIONS, AND THE LATTER HAD S NUMBER OF SMALL LAKES AND
PONDS ON BARREN GROUND,INTERSPERSED WITH HILLS; A DANCING HOPPER WAS
PROVIDED FOR ENTERTAINMENT. PRO 0.273.600 PRV 0.094.339.940 SKINNYMON
